Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> no tests are using appc so I believe we have an issue not related to this patch.
> Let's wait @Krzysztof point of view

APPC is using common/maria-db deployment yaml to deploy it's own DB. To merge this change we need to apply one more additionall modification in common/mariadb-galera/resources/create-deployment.yml which was originally presented in patch set 1 https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/109897/1
